info.name: Wallet Advanced API
info.description:
Postman collection for the Wallet Advanced pillar — deposit intents, spend intents, withdrawal requests, wallet holds, wallet batches, rule sets, threshold rules, and policy gates.
Based on the wallet plugin using prefix /api/v1/wallet-advanced

item.name: Phase 4 — C4 Auto Top-up & L10 Payment Source
L10.1 — Get Payment Source (GC Wallet priority)

request.description: L10: Resolve how much to pay from GC Wallet vs external payment. Returns wallet_amount, payment_intent_amount, wallet_id, is_split.

item.name: L10.2 — Get Payment Source (amount exceeds wallet)

request.description: L10: Split payment scenario — wallet covers partial amount, remainder via external payment intent.
C4: Manually trigger auto top-up for a deposit wallet. Creates payment_intent using the account's stored payment method. Emits AUTO_TOPUP_INITIATED or AUTO_TOPUP_NO_PAYMENT_METHOD.

item.name: Phase5: Simulate CLAIM_SETTLED → wallet deposit intent

request.description: Phase 5: CLAIM_SETTLED automatically triggers wallet_deposit_intent creation for the claimant's GC_WALLET. Emits CLAIM_PAYOUT_INITIATED. This folder documents the flow — trigger via claim-api.postman_collection settle endpoint.

Phase 6: REFERRAL_REWARD_REQUESTED automatically triggers COIN wallet deposit intent creation for the beneficiary. Auto-creates COIN wallet (wallet_type=MAIN, currency=COIN) if not exists. Emits REFERRAL_REWARD_CREDITED.

Event chain:
  POLICY_ACTIVATED
  → PolicyActivatedHandler (referral plugin)
  → referral_reward_grant (referrer + referee)
  → REFERRAL_REWARD_REQUESTED
  → ReferralRewardHandler (wallet plugin)
  → wallet_deposit_intent (COIN)
  → REFERRAL_REWARD_CREDITED

item.name: Phase 7C — Crowd Claim Payout → Wallet Credit
item.description: Phase 7C: CROWD_CLAIM_PAYOUT_PAID → wallet_deposit_intent for claimant GC_WALLET (MYR)

item.name: 7C.1 Verify: Deposit Intent Created for Crowd Claim Payout

request.description: After CROWD_CLAIM_PAYOUT_PAID fires, verify wallet_deposit_intent was created for the claimant's GC_WALLET (MYR). CrowdClaimPayoutHandler resolves claim_case.account_id via crowd_claim_payout → crowd_period_claim → claim_case.

exec: pm.test('Deposit intent exists', () => pm.expect(Array.isArray(json) ? json.length > 0 : json.id).to.be.ok);

request.description: Verify claimant wallet balance reflects the crowd claim payout. Handler emits CROWD_PAYOUT_WALLET_CREDITED after creating deposit_intent.
